compiled_state.title: Delete orphan wrapper: purge-non-project-tickets.sh (+ fix wrong comment at rebar:485)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
5-line exec wrapper around ticket-purge-bridge.sh (canonical impl behind the purge-bridge dispatcher arm) kept only because the dso plugin called it by this name. Nothing execs the wrapper; references are comments (rebar:485 — which WRONGLY says it 'handles tracker initialization' — and ticket-purge-bridge.sh:3) + its test. Dispatcher path separately covered by test-ticket-purge-bridge-dispatcher.sh.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Wrapper + tests/scripts/test-purge-non-project-tickets.sh deleted
- [ ] rebar:485 + ticket-purge-bridge.sh:3 comments corrected
- [ ] test-ticket-purge-bridge-dispatcher.sh still green
